features.title: Adaptive Shared Cooking
features.description: Same recipe. Two plates. Both partners hit their goals automatically. The AI calculates personalized portions based on each partner's TDEE, body profile, and dietary goals.
highlights: TDEE-based portion calculation using Mifflin-St Jeor equation
Individualized plating instructions per partner
Macro breakdown (Protein, Carbs, Fat) per plate
Works with any recipe — no special meals needed

features.title: Real-Time Shared Grocery List
features.description: Add milk at home. It appears on your partner's phone at the store in under 100ms. WebSocket-powered sync via Cloudflare Durable Objects. No phone calls. No duplicate texts.
highlights: Sub-100ms WebSocket sync between partners
AI auto-categorization into 7 categories
Quick-add chips for frequently bought items
One-tap 'Done Shopping' moves food to pantry

features.title: Pantry-First AI
features.description: Type 'chicken, rice, spinach.' The AI parses natural language, categorizes items, and uses your pantry to suggest meals you can make right now. Zero shopping trips needed.
highlights: Natural language pantry input — no barcode scanning
AI-powered category sorting with fallback review
Smart shopping-to-pantry flow after grocery runs
Pantry-aware meal suggestions reduce food waste

features.title: AI Meal Planning
features.description: Chat with AI to plan tonight's dinner or generate an entire week. Multi-provider AI chain (DeepSeek, Alibaba, ZAI) with automatic fallback. Missing ingredients go straight to your shared list.
highlights: Conversational AI chat with session memory
Generate single meals or full 7-day plans
Save favorite recipes for quick access
AI-generated meal photography (Flux.2 via OpenRouter)

features.title: Real-Time Sync Architecture
features.description: Built on Cloudflare Durable Objects with WebSocket connections. Every change — grocery items, pantry updates, meal plans — syncs between both partners in real-time. Works offline too.
highlights: Cloudflare Durable Objects with per-household isolation
WebSocket connections with sub-100ms latency
Offline queue with automatic sync on reconnect
PWA installable — works like a native app

steps.title: Create Your Kitchen
steps.description: Set up your profile — name, dietary preferences, body goals, and what's in your kitchen right now. Takes 2 minutes.
steps.detail: Enter your name, select dietary preferences (Vegetarian, Keto, etc.), add allergies, set body goals (lose weight, build muscle, just eat well), and optionally enter body metrics for personalized portions.

steps.title: Link With Your Partner
steps.description: Share a 6-digit code. Your partner enters it. Instantly connected — one shared kitchen, two profiles.
steps.detail: A unique 6-digit invite code links both partners. No account creation friction — just enter the code and you're sharing the same kitchen, grocery list, pantry, and meal plans.

steps.title: Stock Your Pantry
steps.description: Type what you have in natural language — 'chicken, 2 cups rice, spinach.' The AI parses it, categorizes it, and remembers it.
steps.detail: No barcode scanning. No manual entry. Just type what you have and the AI handles parsing quantities, categories, and brands. The pantry drives smarter meal suggestions.

steps.title: Shop Together
steps.description: One shared grocery list. Both partners see changes in real-time. AI auto-categorizes everything. Check off items as you shop.
steps.detail: Items sync in under 100ms via WebSocket. Quick-add chips surface your most-bought items. When you're done, one tap moves food items to pantry and removes non-food items.

steps.title: Cook Together
steps.description: Follow one recipe. The AI gives each partner their own plating — different portions, different macros, same delicious dinner.
steps.detail: The adaptive cooking engine calculates personalized portions using each partner's TDEE. Partner A gets 450 cal, Partner B gets 700 cal. Same stir-fry, same pan, different plates.
